summary: Tested all Shadcn Select / SearchableSelect replacements across admin and cart. Fixed 4 critical bugs that prevented admin page from loading. 8/10 test flows pass. 2 product dropdowns (manual order and manual subscription) incorrectly use regular Shadcn Select instead of SearchableSelect - missing search functionality for 38+ products.

bugs_fixed_by_tester.fix: Added missing @/components/ui/command module declaration - was causing TypeScript compilation error in searchable-select.tsx
Fixed SelectItem value='' causing Radix UI runtime crash. Applied pattern: Select value={filter || 'all'} + onValueChange={v => setFilter(v === 'all' ? '' : v)} + SelectItem value='all'
paymentFilterOptions had { value: '', label: 'All Payment Modes' } causing crash. Changed to value='all_modes'
PARTNER_MAP_OPTIONS inline editing dropdown used value='' for 'Not set' option. Fixed with '__none__' sentinel value

ui_bugs.issue: manual-order-product-select uses regular Shadcn Select (not SearchableSelect). 38+ products listed without any search/filter input. Test requirement says search should appear and 'Zoho' should filter results.
ui_bugs.code_location: OrdersTab.tsx line 574 - uses Select not SearchableSelect

ui_bugs.issue: manual-sub-product-select uses regular Shadcn Select (not SearchableSelect). 38+ products listed without search input. Test requirement says 'searchable options' should appear.
ui_bugs.code_location: SubscriptionsTab.tsx line 427 - uses Select not SearchableSelect

issues: ResizeObserver loop errors in console when SearchableSelect/Command popover opens - non-fatal but noisy (bundle.js:192190)

test_results.1_cart_zoho_subscription_type: PASS - 3 options (Paid-Annual, Paid-Monthly, Free/Not on Zoho) in Shadcn Select
test_results.2_cart_partner_tag_response: PASS - 3 options (Yes, Pre-existing Customer, Not yet) in Shadcn Select
test_results.3_admin_orders_manual_product: PARTIAL - 38 products shown BUT no search input (uses regular Select not SearchableSelect)
test_results.4_admin_orders_manual_status: PASS - 2 options (Paid Manual, Unpaid Manual) in Shadcn Select
test_results.5_admin_subscriptions_manual_product: PARTIAL - 38 products shown BUT no search input (uses regular Select not SearchableSelect)
test_results.6_admin_customers_country_searchable: PASS - SearchableSelect with search found, filtering 'United' shows UK + US
test_results.7_admin_quotes_product_searchable: PASS - SearchableSelect with search found, 'Zoho' filters to 16 results
test_results.8_admin_filter_bars: PASS - Orders (14 statuses, 5 methods), Subscriptions, Customers all use Shadcn Select
test_results.9_admin_promo_form: PASS - discount_type (2 opts), applies_to (3 opts), product_eligibility (3 opts) all Shadcn Select
test_results.10_admin_tenants_role: PASS - 3 role options (Partner Super Admin, Partner Admin, Partner Staff) in Shadcn Select

action_items: Replace manual-order-product-select (OrdersTab.tsx line 574) with SearchableSelect component instead of regular Select - it has 38+ products and needs search
Replace manual-sub-product-select (SubscriptionsTab.tsx line 427) with SearchableSelect component instead of regular Select - it has 38+ products and needs search
Optional: investigate ResizeObserver loop errors from SearchableSelect Command popover - non-fatal but creates console noise
critical_code_review_comments: SelectItem with value='' is prohibited by Radix UI - any new Select component must use non-empty string values for all SelectItem elements
CustomersTab.tsx is approaching 400+ lines - consider splitting into smaller components
Filter state pattern should use 'all' sentinel value consistently across all filter selects, not mix empty string and 'all'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin page was crashing on load due to SelectItem value='' violations (Radix UI requirement). Tester fixed all empty-string SelectItem values across 8 admin files and fixed TypeScript compilation error in searchable-select.tsx. The 2 remaining issues are manual-order-product-select and manual-sub-product-select using regular Select instead of SearchableSelect. After main agent fixes those, retest by opening Create Manual Order/Subscription dialogs and verifying search input appears in the product dropdown. All other 8 test scenarios already confirmed working.

rca_of_issues.runtime_crash: When native <select> elements were replaced with Shadcn Select (Radix UI), the SelectItem components inherited value='' from the old native select options. Radix UI throws a runtime error when SelectItem has value='' because it uses empty string internally as a sentinel for 'no selection'. Fix: use 'all' or non-empty sentinel values for 'All X' filter items.
rca_of_issues.ts_compile_error: searchable-select.tsx imports from @/components/ui/command (JSX file) but shadcn-ui.d.ts had no module declaration for it. TypeScript couldn't infer prop types causing TS2559/TS2322 errors. Fix: added module declaration with 'any' types.
